message:
Running command: # Both environments have 0fe599b2 as open_pdks_rev. 
# But the dygnx4 environment (which is NIX_PYTHONPREFIX/PATH) has its OWN open_pdks_rev:
cat $(find /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND IN dygnx4 env"

# Find ALL open_pdks_rev files in nix store
find /nix/store -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Both environments have 0fe599b2 as open_pdks_rev. 
# But the dygnx4 environment (which is NIX_PYTHONPREFIX/PATH) has its OWN open_pdks_rev:
cat $(find /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND IN dygnx4 env"

# Find ALL open_pdks_rev files in nix store
